text: Brazil prediction thread idea: Neymar dragging Brazil through big tournament moments is hard to forget. My gut says: Fast wingers, tournament swagger, and enough midfield control to go deep. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Argentina prediction thread idea: Messi's 2022 run changed the whole feeling around Argentina in knockout games. My gut says: Still feels built for knockout chaos if the midfield rhythm clicks. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

France prediction thread idea: France's 2018 pace and 2022 resilience make them feel built for tournament football. My gut says: Scary depth, transition speed, and match-winners everywhere. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

England prediction thread idea: England always has that mix of huge talent and tournament tension. My gut says: If the attack stays brave, this squad has a real path. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Spain prediction thread idea: Spain's 2010 team is still the cleanest example of control winning a World Cup. My gut says: Possession with bite: young legs, sharp passing, big upside. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Portugal prediction thread idea: Ronaldo's 2018 hat trick against Spain is still peak World Cup drama. My gut says: A balanced squad with enough creators to punish any open game. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Germany prediction thread idea: Germany in 2014 is still the reference point for a team peaking at the perfect time. My gut says: Never ignore Germany when a tournament bracket starts getting weird. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

USA prediction thread idea: Donovan's 2010 stoppage-time goal is still the USA World Cup memory that gives me chills. My gut says: Home crowd energy plus pace could make this a noisy bracket. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Mexico prediction thread idea: Mexico beating Germany in 2018 is still the kind of memory that makes dark-horse talk fun. My gut says: Home-region energy and knockout grit make this one fun to track. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc

Japan prediction thread idea: That 2022 group-stage run gave Japan a proper dark-horse identity. My gut says: Organized, technical, fearless against bigger names. Card is here if anyone wants to argue the path: https://worldcup.bluet.cc
